text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm Daiwa Scarlet. Pleased to meet you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to be the number one Umamusume! I'm
going to become the absolute and undisputed
best, and my superiority will be plain for all to
see.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Which is why, as my trainer, you must strive to
become number one as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
